ksa_text: Ability to monitor and control AI systems' operational performance against established governance standards, policies, and risk thresholds.

dcwf.top_element_label: Collect intrusion artifacts (e.g., source code, malware, trojans) and use discovered data to enable mitigation of potential cyber defense incidents within the enterprise.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

top_anchors.element_label: Collect intrusion artifacts (e.g., source code, malware, trojans) and use discovered data to enable mitigation of potential cyber defense incidents within the enterprise.
Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-A-005 (DG, Ability) maps to Market Research Analyst scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4397 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.440, dcwf=0.416, onet=0.415. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4397 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DG-A-005 (DG, composite 0.4397) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets does not surface this DG-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4397 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DG domain content at composite 0.4397 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4397, domain DG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
